title: Pending Corrections
description: Spec-silent shape (the approved build plan's Phase 2 section names 'data/pending_corrections.json' -- fed by audit.yml's findings or manual owner edits, drained first by the analyst each run -- without fixing fields; decision logged in IMPROVEMENT_BACKLOG.md). Top-level object: a version plus a queue of correction candidates awaiting the analyst's evidence check. A confirmed pending item becomes a content/corrections.json entry (schemas/corrections.schema.json) and its card's status is set to 'corrected'; an entry here is removed once actioned (not schema-tracked -- reconcile_run.py's own job). Phase 2 seeds data/pending_corrections.json = {"version": 1, "pending": []}.

issue_description.description: What might be wrong with the card, in plain language.

evidence_url.description: A source the analyst should fetch and weigh when checking this candidate.

source.description: Whether audit.yml's own checks (e.g. link rot, missed-story) or a manual owner edit raised this candidate.
